session.user: Run the following command and report all results: uv run pytest tests/commands/navigation/test_checkout.py -v Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command for you and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on checkout navigation tests

Exit code 1 ============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 17 items
tests/commands/navigation/test_checkout.py ..FF....F........ [100%]
=================================== FAILURES =================================== _____________ test_checkout_creates_worktree_for_unchecked_branch ______________
def test_checkout_creates_worktree_for_unchecked_branch() -> None: """Test that checkout auto-creates worktree when branch exists but is not checked out.""" runner = CliRunner() with erk_isolated_fs_env(runner, env_overrides=None) as env: work_dir = env.erk_root / env.cwd.name
# Branch 'existing-branch' exists in git but is not checked out git_ops = FakeGit( worktrees={ env.cwd: [ WorktreeInfo(path=env.cwd, branch="main"), ] }, current_branches={env.cwd: "main"}, git_common_dirs={env.cwd: env.git_dir}, local_branches={env.cwd: ["main", "existing-branch"]}, # exists in git
... [155 lines omitted] ...
